query:
SELECT w.id, w.name, w.color
        FROM workspace w
        JOIN workspace_member m ON m.workspace_id = w.id
        WHERE m.user_id = $1 AND w.deleted_at IS NULL
        ORDER BY GREATEST(
          w.updated_at,
          COALESCE(
            (SELECT MAX(t.synced_at) FROM task t WHERE t.workspace_id = w.id),
            w.updated_at
          )
        ) DESC
